mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) continued to operate smoothly and in an orderly manner in 2020. Since its introduction in 1983, the LERS has weathered numerous challenges, demonstrating its resilience to shocks. Despite the pandemic and a volatile macroeconomic environment, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained stable throughout the year. src_raw: 聯匯制度得以維持穩健，全賴多年來所建立的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2020年對外部門報告》中的總結指出，聯匯制度的公信力建基於具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融監管、靈活的經濟及審慎的財政制度。同時，金管局透過與業界緊密聯繫，以及透過傳統及社交媒體與公眾有效溝通，迅速澄清謠言，並適時提供有關事實與數據的最新資訊。金管局亦利用最新的科技與數據分析技術，繼續提升監察能力，以靈活應對最新市況及新出現的風險。
mt_raw: The robustness of the LERS is underpinned by the solid foundation built over the years. As summarised by the International Monetary Fund in its 2020 External Sector Report, the credibility of the LERS is based on its highly transparent operating rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, robust financial supervision, a flexible economy and a prudent fiscal regime. At the same time, the HKMA maintains close contact with the industry and communicates effectively with the public through traditional and social media to quickly dispel rumours and provide timely updates on facts and data. The HKMA also continues to enhance its monitoring capabilities by leveraging the latest technology and data analytics to respond flexibly to the latest market conditions and emerging risks.

src_raw: 雖然疫情對經濟造成沉重壓力，但銀行體系維持穩健，資本及流動資金充裕。於2020年底，本地銀行的資本充足比率為20.7%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。大型銀行的平均流動性覆蓋比率亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%，於2020年第4季達到155.1%。受疫情影響，銀行的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2020年底上升至0.9%，但仍屬穩健並遠低於自2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: Although the pandemic has put significant pressure on the economy, the banking system remains robust, with ample capital and liquidity. At the end of 2020, the capital adequacy ratio of local banks was 20.7%, well above the international minimum requirement of 8%. The average liquidity coverage ratio of large banks also far exceeded the statutory minimum requirement of 100%, reaching 155.1% in the fourth quarter of 2020. Affected by the pandemic, banks’ asset quality deteriorated slightly, with the ratio of classified loans rising to 0.9% at the end of 2020, but this remains healthy and well below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 銀行體系在經濟與社會中扮演重要的金融中介角色。年內金管局一方面繼續重點監管銀行的信用及流動性風險，另一方面亦密切留意疫情對銀行營運的影響，並採取多項措施，確保銀行體系能繼續提供基本服務，以及提供貸款支持經濟。金管局在3月下調逆周期緩衝資本比率100基點至1%，又在4月調低監管儲備水平。這些措施為銀行體系合共釋放約1萬億港元的借貸空間。
mt_raw: The banking system plays an important role as a financial intermediary in the economy and society. During the year, the HKMA continued to focus on supervising banks’ credit and liquidity risks, while closely monitoring the impact of the pandemic on banks’ operations. It also took a number of measures to ensure that the banking system could continue to provide basic services and loans to support the economy. In March, the HKMA lowered the countercyclical capital buffer ratio by 100 basis points to 1%, and in April it lowered the regulatory reserve requirement. These measures released about HK$1 trillion of lending capacity for the banking system as a whole.

src_raw: 我們深知中小企在當前的經濟環境下或會面對資金周轉壓力。因此，金管局聯同我們在2019年成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制推出多輪紓困措施，包括「預先批核還息不還本」計劃，將合資格企業的所有貸款本金還款延期6個月。截至2020年底，銀行共批出超過58,000宗貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉資超過7,400億港元。鑑於疫情反覆，金管局因應情況將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃展期，並於2021年3月將計劃延長至2021年10月底。香港按揭證券有限公司亦在其中小企融資擔保計劃下推出「百分百擔保特惠貸款」，以紓緩中小企支付僱員薪金及租金的負擔。截至2020年底，共批出超過25,000宗申請，涉資約400億港元。該計劃在2021年第1季作出優化，申請期限亦延長至2021年12月31日。年內銀行亦批出超過28,000宗紓困措施申請，協助個人客戶的資金周轉，涉資440億港元。銀行業同心協力，支持企業及個人客戶，共渡時艱，實在令人鼓舞。
mt_raw: We are well aware that SMEs may face funding pressures in the current economic environment. Therefore, the HKMA, together with the banking sector SME loan coordination mechanism established in 2019, launched several rounds of relief measures, including a ‘pre-approved principal payment holiday’ scheme, which deferred all principal repayments of eligible enterprises’ loans for six months. By the end of 2020, banks had approved over 58,000 cases of loan extensions and other support measures, involving over HK$740 billion. In view of the recurring pandemic, the HKMA extended the ‘pre-approved principal payment holiday’ scheme in response to the situation, and in March 2021 further extended the scheme until the end of October 2021. The Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation Limited also launched a ‘100% Guaranteed Special Loan’ under its SME Financing Guarantee Scheme to alleviate the burden of SMEs in paying employees’ salaries and rents. By the end of 2020, over 25,000 applications had been approved, involving about HK$40 billion. The scheme was enhanced in the first quarter of 2021, and the application period was extended to 31 December 2021. During the year, banks also approved over 28,000 applications for relief measures to help individual customers with their cash flow, involving HK$44 billion. It is encouraging that the banking sector has come together to support corporate and individual customers in weathering the difficulties.

src_raw: 隨着科技長足發展，銀行業的經營環境亦急速轉變。因此，金管局的工作不僅限於應對當前的挑戰，亦要放眼未來，擴大人才庫，以配合銀行業的日後發展。我們與香港銀行公會及香港銀行學會聯合展開「提升未來銀行業人才的專業能力」研究計劃，評估銀行業未來幾年的潛在人才缺口，並為銀行規劃清晰的路線圖，以期未雨綢繆，改善人才供應的情況。我們又推出「銀行業人才起動計劃」，為本地大學的應屆畢業生提供為期6個月的實習機會及銀行業相關的特定培訓，藉以為業界培育人才。在本港勞工市場的嚴峻時期推出此計劃，亦正好為有志加入銀行業的年青人提供機會。
mt_raw: As technology advances rapidly, the operating environment of the banking sector is also changing rapidly. Therefore, the HKMA’s work is not limited to addressing current challenges, but also to looking ahead and expanding the talent pool to meet the future development of the banking sector. We have jointly launched a research project with the Hong Kong Association of Banks and the Hong Kong Institute of Bankers to ‘Enhance the Professional Competencies of Future Banking Talent’, which assesses the potential talent gap in the banking sector over the next few years and develops a clear roadmap for banks to improve the talent supply situation in a forward-looking manner. We have also launched the ‘Banking Talent Programme’, which provides local university graduates with a six-month internship opportunity and specific training related to the banking sector, with a view to nurturing talent for the industry. The launch of this programme during a challenging period in Hong Kong’s labour market also provides an opportunity for young people who aspire to join the banking sector.

src_raw: 第一個範疇是推動綠色及可持續金融。自2019年5月推出分三階段進行的措施以來，相關工作已取得理想進展。我們在2020年完成對47間銀行的「綠色基準」評估，發表白皮書及發出通告，就銀行管理氣候風險提供指引及分享經驗。我們亦全力推進第二階段的工作，制定銀行業管理氣候風險的監管架構。此外，我們會致力在2025年或之前按照氣候相關財務披露工作小組的建議，要求銀行就氣候相關資料作出披露。這將使香港成為亞洲區內首個作出相關具體要求的地區。
mt_raw: The first area is the promotion of green and sustainable finance. Since the launch of the three-phase measures in May 2019, good progress has been made. In 2020, we completed the ‘green baseline’ assessment of 47 banks, published a white paper and issued a circular to provide guidance and share experience on banks’ management of climate risks. We are also pressing ahead with the second phase of work to develop a regulatory framework for banks’ management of climate risks. In addition, we will strive to require banks to disclose climate-related information in accordance with the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures by 2025 or earlier. This will make Hong Kong the first jurisdiction in Asia to make such specific requirements.

src_raw: 為進一步發展香港的綠色金融生態圈，金管局一直協助政府發行綠色債券，而最近發行的第二批政府綠色債券更大受國際投資者歡迎。乘着這個發展趨勢，財政司司長在《2021至22年度財政預算案》中宣布政府會擴大「政府綠色債券計劃」的規模，將借款上限提升一倍至2,000億港元，並會增加日後發行的綠色債券的種類與發行渠道。
mt_raw: To further develop Hong Kong’s green finance ecosystem, the HKMA has been assisting the Government in issuing green bonds, and the second batch of government green bonds issued recently was well received by international investors. Building on this trend, the Financial Secretary announced in the 2021-22 Budget that the Government would expand the scale of the Government Green Bond Programme by doubling the borrowing ceiling to HK$200 billion and increasing the diversity and issuance channels of green bonds in the future.

src_raw: 為鞏固香港作為區內綠色及可持續金融樞紐，我們整體策略的其中一環，是與本地其他監管機構及國際社會合作，推進綠色金融議程。在本地方面，金管局聯同其他監管機構成立綠色和可持續金融跨機構督導小組，協調金融業的相關措施。該小組已經制定策略性計劃，促進香港的綠色及可持續金融的發展。在國際方面，金管局應國際金融公司的邀請，成為亞洲區域創始成員及首個區域執行理事，與其合力推動「綠色商業銀行聯盟」。聯盟旨在於全球金融市場推動綠色銀行業，並由亞洲開始，逐步擴展至其他地區。
mt_raw: As part of our overall strategy to consolidate Hong Kong’s position as a regional green and sustainable finance hub, we are working with other local regulators and the international community to advance the green finance agenda. Locally, the HKMA has joined forces with other regulators to establish a cross-agency steering group on green and sustainable finance to coordinate related measures in the financial sector. The group has already developed a strategic plan to promote the development of green and sustainable finance in Hong Kong. Internationally, the HKMA has been invited by the International Finance Corporation to become a founding member of the Asia region and its first regional executive director, and to work together to promote the ‘Green Banking Alliance’. The Alliance aims to promote green banking in global financial markets, starting from Asia and gradually expanding to other regions.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction volume', '快速支付系統': 'Faster Payment System', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金融科技': 'fintech'}
src_raw: 過去一年清楚顯示，金融科技能夠擴展我們的「工具箱」，以應對突如其來的衝擊。面對新冠病毒疫情，電子支付渠道發揮了前所未見的作用。自2018年9月推出快速支付系統「轉數快」至2020年底期間，「轉數快」已錄得690萬個登記賬戶。即使在社交距離措施的限制下，公眾仍能利用「轉數快」這個安全快捷及穩妥的方式收付及轉撥資金，令「轉數快」的平均每日交易量在2020年急增2.3倍。我們亦一直與政府合作，將「轉數快」的應用範圍擴大至繳付更多種政府及公共服務帳單。
mt_raw: The past year has clearly shown that fintech can expand our ‘toolbox’ to cope with unexpected shocks. In the face of the COVID-19 pandemic, electronic payment channels have played an unprecedented role. From the launch of the Faster Payment System (FPS) in September 2018 to the end of 2020, FPS recorded 6.9 million registered accounts. Even under social distancing restrictions, the public could use FPS as a safe, fast and reliable way to receive, pay and transfer funds, resulting in a 2.3-fold increase in FPS’ average daily transaction volume in 2020. We have also been working with the Government to expand the application of FPS to cover more types of government and public service bill payments.

src_raw: 此外，金融科技亦有助銀行提供更多元化及便利的銀行客戶服務。獲金管局發牌的所有8間虛擬銀行年內已經全數在香港開業。截至2020年底，在虛擬銀行開設的帳戶共有420,000個，總計客戶存款150億港元。其中部分虛擬銀行已經率先使用新類型數據進行信貸評估，以開拓新的客戶群及促進普及金融。金管局繼續推動在香港發展更具規模及更多元化的合規科技生態圈，作為「銀行易」措施的一部分，從而精簡監管規定，提升客戶體驗。除透過刊發通訊系列，以提高業界對合規科技應用的認知外，金管局亦發表白皮書，載述加快銀行業採用合規科技的兩年計劃。另外，金管局又展開「商業數據通」項目，以便中小企利用自身的數碼足跡更便捷地獲取銀行融資。
mt_raw: In addition, fintech helps banks to provide more diversified and convenient customer services. All eight virtual banks licensed by the HKMA commenced operations in Hong Kong during the year. As at the end of 2020, a total of 420,000 accounts had been opened in virtual banks, with total customer deposits of HK$15 billion. Some virtual banks have already started using new types of data for credit assessment to tap into new customer segments and promote financial inclusion. The HKMA continues to promote the development of a larger and more diversified regulatory technology ecosystem in Hong Kong as part of the ‘Bank Easy’ initiative, so as to streamline regulatory requirements and enhance customer experience. In addition to publishing a series of communications to raise industry awareness of the application of regulatory technology, the HKMA has also issued a white paper setting out a two-year plan to accelerate the adoption of regulatory technology in the banking sector. Furthermore, the HKMA has launched the ‘Commercial Data Platform’ project to enable SMEs to obtain bank financing more conveniently by using their own digital footprints.

src_raw: 金融科技面貌日新月異，科技應用亦日趨普及，金管局需繼續秉持嚴謹的監管。為此，我們推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，以提高銀行的網絡防衛能力。我們亦加強對科技風險管理的現場審查，並制定監管框架，評估運用創新信用風險評估方法的個人貸款產品的信用風險。金管局亦展開監管科技應用的三年計劃，以提升監管流程的成效及前瞻性。我們現正進行的有關工作包括更有效地利用數據及科技來加強反洗錢方面的監管。
mt_raw: As fintech continues to evolve and technology applications become more widespread, the HKMA needs to maintain rigorous supervision. To this end, we have launched the ‘Cyber Security Fortification Initiative 2.0’ to enhance banks’ cyber defence capabilities. We have also strengthened on-site inspections of technology risk management and developed a regulatory framework to assess the credit risk of personal loan products that use innovative credit risk assessment methods. The HKMA has also launched a three-year plan for the application of regulatory technology to enhance the effectiveness and forward-looking nature of the regulatory process. The work we are currently undertaking in this area includes making more effective use of data and technology to strengthen anti-money laundering supervision.

src_raw: 面對新冠病毒疫情，香港經濟在2020 年連續第二年收縮，並錄得歷年來最嚴重的跌幅。消費及旅遊相關行業尤其受到重創，其收縮幅度較整體經濟更大。與此同時，勞工市場急速惡化，通脹有所緩和。政府及金管局為應對嚴峻的經濟環境，推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施以支持經濟。新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期2021年經濟會恢復增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展以及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s economy contracted for a second consecutive year in 2020, amid the COVID-19 pandemic, recording its sharpest decline ever. Consumption and tourism-related sectors were particularly hard hit, with a greater contraction than the overall economy. Meanwhile, the labour market deteriorated rapidly, and inflation eased. To address the challenging economic environment, the government and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) introduced the largest relief measures in history to support the economy. COVID-19 vaccinations are expected to enable a return to normal economic activity, and the economy is forecast to resume growth in 2021. However, the strength and pace of economic recovery remain subject to many uncertainties, including the development of the pandemic and the availability, coverage, and effectiveness of vaccines.

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金融業': 'financial sector'}
src_raw: 受新冠病毒疫情打擊，香港經濟在2020年收縮6.1%，是連續第二年收縮，亦是有紀錄以來最嚴重的年度跌幅（表1）。經濟活動急跌主要是本地需求急劇收縮所致（圖1）。疫情爆發及相應的社交距離措施令本地消費活動受到重創。由於營商環境轉差，整體投資支出亦明顯減少。對外方面，儘管疫情導致供應鏈受干擾及全球需求萎縮，但部分受惠於中國內地迅速恢復生產和經濟活動，全年合計香港貨物出口僅略為下降。相比之下，由於封城、關閉邊境及旅客流量限制令全球旅遊業陷入停頓，所以香港服務輸出嚴重受挫。本地及轉口帶動的需求疲弱，亦令貨物進口及服務輸入轉差。由於進口總額下跌步伐較出口快，淨出口（貿易順差）為本地生產總值帶來支持（圖1）。按經濟行業分析，消費及旅遊相關行業，例如零售、住宿及膳食服務業受到的打擊尤其嚴重，收縮情況較整體經濟更差，而金融業則溫和增長。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s economy contracted by 6.1% in 2020, amid the COVID-19 pandemic, marking the second consecutive year of contraction and the most severe annual decline on record (Table 1). The sharp drop in economic activity was mainly due to a dramatic contraction in domestic demand (Chart 1). The outbreak of the pandemic and the corresponding social distancing measures severely impacted local consumption activities. Overall investment expenditure also declined significantly due to a deterioration in the business environment. Externally, despite supply chain disruptions and a decline in global demand caused by the pandemic, Hong Kong’s total goods exports fell only slightly, partly benefiting from the rapid resumption of production and economic activities in mainland China. In contrast, Hong Kong’s service exports were severely affected as global tourism came to a standstill due to city lockdowns, border closures, and travel restrictions. Weak demand driven by local consumption and re-exports also led to a deterioration in goods imports and service imports. As the decline in total imports outpaced that of exports, net exports (trade surplus) provided support to gross domestic product (GDP) (Chart 1). By economic sector, consumption and tourism-related industries, such as retail, accommodation, and food services, were particularly hard hit, contracting more than the overall economy, while the financial sector grew moderately.

terms: {'流動性': 'Liquidity', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '防疫抗疫基金': 'Anti-Epidemic Fund', '預算': 'budget requests'}
src_raw: 政府為應對疫情，透過2020至21年度《財政預算案》迅速推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施，並從「防疫抗疫基金」發放4輪補助，合共超過3,000億港元。這些措施包括向合資格居民發放一筆過10,000港元現金、透過「保就業」計劃提供工資補貼，以及為受疫情重創的行業提供一筆過資助、寬減租金及豁免收費。金管局則採取三管齊下的方式支持銀行業，從而支撐實體經濟。有關措施包括與銀行業積極協調，減輕企業及家庭的資金周轉壓力，釋放緩衝以提高銀行的借貸能力，並確保銀行有足夠流動性支持本地經濟活動。
mt_raw: To tackle the pandemic, the government swiftly introduced the largest relief measures in history through the 2020–21 Budget and disbursed four rounds of subsidies totalling over HK$300 billion from the Anti-epidemic Fund. These measures included a one-off cash payout of HK$10,000 to eligible residents, wage subsidies through the Employment Support Scheme, and one-off subsidies, rent concessions, and fee waivers for industries severely affected by the pandemic. The HKMA adopted a three-pronged approach to support the banking sector and, in turn, the real economy. These measures included active coordination with the banking sector to ease liquidity pressures on enterprises and households, releasing buffers to enhance banks’ lending capacity, and ensuring banks had sufficient liquidity to support local economic activities.

terms: {'全球經濟': 'world economy', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '基本通脹率': 'underlying inflation rate', '消費物價指數': 'consumer price inflation', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '通脹': 'inflation'}
src_raw: 通脹壓力在2020年明顯減弱。剔除政府一次性紓困措施的影響，基本通脹率放緩至1.3%，是2009年全球金融危機以來最小的升幅。基本食品（尤其新鮮豬肉）的價格壓力明顯減退；而自行烹煮以外，由於飲食業提供大幅度折扣，所以外出用膳的價格在下半年亦有所下降。隨着早前新簽訂的私人住宅租金回落，消費物價指數租金項目的增長亦回軟（圖2）。更廣泛而言，由於名義工資增長減慢及商業樓宇租金偏軟，本地營商成本壓力減少；而在疲弱的全球經濟狀況下，進口價格通脹有所緩和。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressures eased significantly in 2020. Excluding the impact of the government’s one-off relief measures, underlying inflation slowed to 1.3%, the smallest increase since the global financial crisis in 2009. Price pressures on basic foodstuffs, especially fresh pork, eased significantly. Dining-out prices also fell in the second half of the year as the catering sector offered substantial discounts, apart from self-cooked meals. As newly signed private residential rents fell earlier, the growth of the rental component of the Consumer Price Index also softened (Chart 2). More broadly, local business cost pressures eased due to slower growth in nominal wages and softer commercial rents, while import price inflation moderated amid weak global economic conditions.

src_raw: 勞工市場在2020年急速惡化。經季節性調整的失業率年內由3.3%飆升至6.6%，為16年的高位（圖3），其中零售、住宿及膳食服務等受疫情重創行業的失業率達到10%以上。就業不足率亦於8月升至3.8%，為沙士疫情後的高位。部分由於經濟狀況急速惡化造成的周期性反應，勞動人口參與率輕微減少。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺急跌，反映整體勞工需求進一步收縮。名義工資及收入增長進一步放緩。政府推出「保就業」計劃，為僱主提供有時限的財政支援以保留僱員，使勞工市場獲得一定程度的支持。
mt_raw: The labour market deteriorated rapidly in 2020. The seasonally adjusted unemployment rate soared from 3.3% to 6.6% during the year, a 16-year high (Chart 3), with the unemployment rate in hard-hit sectors such as retail, accommodation, and food services exceeding 10%. The underemployment rate also rose to 3.8% in August, the highest since the SARS epidemic. The labour force participation rate declined slightly, partly due to the cyclical response to the rapid deterioration in economic conditions. Total employment (Chart 3) and private sector job vacancies fell sharply, reflecting a further contraction in overall labour demand. Growth in nominal wages and income slowed further. The government launched the Employment Support Scheme to provide employers with time-limited financial support to retain employees, which provided some support to the labour market.

terms: {'中央銀行': 'central banking', '恒生指數': 'Hang Seng Index', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '首次公開招股': 'initial public offerings'}
src_raw: 隨着新冠病毒疫情爆發，恒生指數在首季急跌至3年低位。繼各國中央銀行及政府推出大型支持措施後，股市在第2季及第3季略為回穩（圖4）。由於新冠病毒疫苗研發出現突破，股市於接近年底時重拾一些上升動力。恒生指數於年底收報27,231點，全年計錄得3.4%跌幅。受惠於內地企業在香港的第二上市活動，2020年本港首次公開招股集資總額約4,000億港元，以集資額計全球排名第二。
mt_raw: As the COVID-19 pandemic broke out, the Hang Seng Index fell sharply in the first quarter to a three-year low. Following large-scale support measures introduced by central banks and governments worldwide, the stock market stabilised slightly in the second and third quarters (Chart 4). As a breakthrough was made in the development of COVID-19 vaccines, the stock market regained some upward momentum towards the end of the year. The Hang Seng Index closed at 27,231 at the end of the year, recording a 3.4% decline for the whole year. Benefiting from the secondary listings of mainland enterprises in Hong Kong, the total funds raised through initial public offerings in Hong Kong reached about HK$400 billion in 2020, ranking second globally in terms of funds raised.

src_raw: 部分受到超低利率所支持，住宅物業市場在2020年大致平穩（圖4）。整體樓價及成交量較前一年均無大變動。然而，由於家庭住戶入息減少，置業負擔能力更為偏緊。另一方面，非住宅物業市場進一步轉弱，物業價格錄得不同程度跌幅，成交量亦見底。受經濟下滑及空置率上升的影響，寫字樓及零售物業租金大幅下跌。鑑於2019年以來非住宅物業市場已出現大幅調整，並預期會持續受壓，加上考慮到經濟基調及外圍環境等其他因素，金管局於8月調整非住宅物業的逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施。政府因應市場需求回落，亦於11月撤銷購置非住宅物業的雙倍從價印花稅這項需求管理措施。
mt_raw: Partly supported by ultra-low interest rates, the residential property market was broadly stable in 2020 (Chart 4). Overall property prices and transaction volumes did not change significantly from the previous year. However, as household incomes declined, affordability for home purchases tightened further. On the other hand, the non-residential property market weakened further, with property prices falling to varying degrees and transaction volumes hitting bottom. Office and retail property rents fell sharply due to the economic downturn and rising vacancy rates. Given that the non-residential property market had undergone a significant adjustment since 2019 and was expected to remain under pressure, coupled with other factors such as the economic fundamentals and external environment, the HKMA adjusted the countercyclical macroprudential regulatory measures for non-residential properties in August. In response to the decline in market demand, the government also withdrew the demand management measure of double ad valorem stamp duty on non-residential property purchases in November.

src_raw: 新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期香港經濟在2021年（全年合計）重拾正增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。具體而言，疫苗廣泛接種需時，因此本地經濟在2021年早段仍面對相當程度的挑戰。對外方面，預計內地經濟會進一步增強，並為香港貨物及服務輸出帶來支持，然而其他主要經濟體的復甦步伐將取決於其大規模接種疫苗計劃的成效。政府預測2021年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎3.5至5.5%之間，與國際組織及私營機構分析員對香港最新的增長預測平均4.4%相符。
mt_raw: COVID-19 vaccinations are expected to enable a return to normal economic activity, and Hong Kong’s economy is forecast to resume positive growth in 2021 (for the year as a whole). However, the strength and pace of economic recovery remain subject to many uncertainties, including the development of the pandemic and the availability, coverage, and effectiveness of vaccines. Specifically, as widespread vaccination will take time, the local economy will still face considerable challenges in the early part of 2021. Externally, the mainland economy is expected to strengthen further, providing support to Hong Kong’s exports of goods and services, but the recovery pace of other major economies will depend on the effectiveness of their large-scale vaccination programmes. The government forecasts that real GDP growth in 2021 will range between 3.5% and 5.5%, in line with the latest growth forecast of 4.4% for Hong Kong by international organisations and private-sector analysts.

src_raw: 鑑於環球及本地經濟狀況仍具挑戰，預期2021年的通脹壓力將維持輕微。此外，早前新簽訂私人住宅租金回落的傳遞效應，將繼續令本地通脹受到抑制。市場共識預測2021年整體通脹率為1.5%，而政府預期整體及基本通脹率分別為1.6%及1%。由於經濟前景在2021年早段仍具挑戰，加上私營機構分析員預計2021年全年失業率仍會在約5.9%的偏高水平，因此短期內勞工市場將繼續受壓。
mt_raw: Given that global and local economic conditions remain challenging, inflationary pressures are expected to remain mild in 2021. In addition, the feed-through effect of the earlier decline in newly signed private residential rents will continue to suppress local inflation. Market consensus predicts that overall inflation in 2021 will be 1.5%, while the government expects overall and underlying inflation rates of 1.6% and 1% respectively. As the economic outlook remains challenging in the early part of 2021, and private-sector analysts expect the unemployment rate to remain at a high level of around 5.9% for the whole of 2021, the labour market will continue to be under pressure in the near term.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情增加不確定因素，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作暢順有序。受到大量股票相關的資金流入所支持，港元匯率於2020 年內大部分時間偏強，而強方兌換保證多次被觸發。聯繫匯率制度是香港金融體系的基石，充分展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: Despite the uncertainties brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic, the operations of Hong Kong’s foreign exchange and monetary markets remained smooth and orderly. Supported by substantial stock-related capital inflows, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained strong for most of 2020, with the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking being triggered multiple times. The Linked Exchange Rate System is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s financial system, demonstrating its strong ability to withstand shocks.

terms: {'匯價': 'exchange value', '美元儲備': 'US dollar reserves', '貨幣基礎': 'Monetary Base', '貨幣政策': 'monetary policy', '貨幣穩定': 'Monetary Stability'}
src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is to maintain monetary stability, i.e. to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping it within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar in the foreign exchange market. The monetary system primarily adopts a Currency Board System, which stipulates that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% backing to the monetary base. If the monetary base changes, the US dollar reserves must also be adjusted accordingly, matching the changes in the monetary base by 100%.

- 負債證明書（為3間發鈔銀行發行的銀行紙幣提供十足支持）

- Certificates of Indebtedness (which fully back the banknotes issued by the three note-issuing banks)
- Banknotes and coins in circulation issued by the government
- The total balance of settlement accounts at the HKMA (i.e. the Aggregate Balance)
- Exchange Fund Bills and Notes issued by the HKMA on behalf of the government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85 的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to fulfilling the exchange guarantee. When the strong-side (or weak-side) Convertibility Undertaking is triggered, the HKMA, upon request from banks, sells Hong Kong dollars to banks at a rate of HK$7.75 per US dollar and buys US dollars (or buys Hong Kong dollars at HK$7.85 and sells US dollars), causing the Aggregate Balance to increase (or decrease), leading to a drop (or rise) in Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thereby prompting the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate to return to the range of 7.75 to 7.85.

src_raw: 隨着3月全球爆發新冠病毒疫情，避險情緒下環球投資者增持美元，令美元資金狀況明顯收緊。在聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）下，由於港元利率受同期美元利率影響，美元流動性緊張令香港貨幣狀況收緊。儘管其後美國聯邦儲備局實施流動資金計劃，美元資金壓力有所紓緩，但由於股票相關需求及季結效應，令香港貨幣狀況仍維持偏緊。而港元需求殷切，加上港元與美元的正息差刺激套息交易活動，促使港元匯率偏向強方兌換保證匯率（圖1），強方兌換保證最終於4月被觸發。其後新股集資活動暢旺，以及「滬港通」與「深港通」下的南向資金帶動股票相關資金流入，令港元一直維持接近7.75水平，並導致強方兌換保證在2020年內多次被觸發。強方兌換保證在4月21日至10月28日期間合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入3,835億港元。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2020年全年運作正常。
mt_raw: As the COVID-19 pandemic spread globally in March, risk-averse sentiment led international investors to increase their holdings of US dollars, tightening US dollar funding conditions significantly. Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, as Hong Kong dollar interest rates are influenced by US dollar interest rates of the same tenor, the tight US dollar liquidity caused a tightening of monetary conditions in Hong Kong. Although the US Federal Reserve subsequently implemented liquidity programmes, easing US dollar funding pressures, Hong Kong’s monetary conditions remained tight due to stock-related demand and quarter-end effects. Strong demand for the Hong Kong dollar, coupled with a positive interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar that stimulated carry trade activities, pushed the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate towards the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking level (Chart 1). The strong-side Convertibility Undertaking was eventually triggered in April. Subsequently, robust new share issuance activities and southbound fund flows under Stock Connect programmes drove stock-related capital inflows, keeping the Hong Kong dollar close to the 7.75 level and leading to multiple triggers of the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking in 2020. The strong-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 85 times between 21 April and 28 October, with cumulative capital inflows totalling HK$383.5 billion. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2020.

src_raw: 總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2019年底的11,330億港元，增加至2020年底的15,266億港元（圖2）。隨着強方兌換保證被觸發，金管局應銀行要求合共沽出3,835億港元。新冠病毒疫情引致環球宏觀環境波動，金管局為了提供額外港元流動性，亦於4月底及5月初逐步減發總計200億港元外匯基金票據。由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）由2019年底的543億港元，增加至2020年底的4,575億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由10,787億港元，稍降至10,692億港元，反映外匯基金票據發行量減少，這抵銷了按一貫做法以新發行的外匯基金票據及債券來吸納未償還外匯基金票據及債券的利息。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: The Aggregate Balance (before discount window operations) and the total outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes increased from HK$11,330 billion at the end of 2019 to HK$15,266 billion at the end of 2020 (Chart 2). As the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered, the HKMA sold a total of HK$383.5 billion in Hong Kong dollars upon banks’ requests. To provide additional Hong Kong dollar liquidity amid the volatile global macroeconomic environment caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, the HKMA also gradually reduced the issuance of Exchange Fund Bills by a total of HK$20 billion at the end of April and the beginning of May. Due to the triggering of the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking and the reduction in the issuance of Exchange Fund Bills, the Aggregate Balance (before discount window operations) increased from HK$54.3 billion at the end of 2019 to HK$4,575 billion at the end of 2020. The total outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes for the year decreased slightly from HK$10,787 billion to HK$10,692 billion, reflecting the reduced issuance of Exchange Fund Bills, which offset the absorption of interest on outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes through the issuance of new Exchange Fund Bills and Notes, in line with established practice. The overall monetary base continued to be fully backed by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 隨着農曆新年假期後流動性需求減退，香港銀行同業拆息在2月普遍下降（圖3）。踏入3月，由於美元資金壓力，連同新股集資相關及季結資金需求等本地因素，香港銀行同業拆息一度上升。其後由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，令總結餘增加，港元流動性狀況逐步紓緩。
mt_raw: As liquidity demand declined after the Lunar New Year holiday, Hong Kong interbank interest rates generally fell in February (Chart 3). In March, due to US dollar funding pressures, coupled with local factors such as new share issuance-related and quarter-end funding demands, Hong Kong interbank interest rates rose temporarily. Subsequently, as the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered and the issuance of Exchange Fund Bills decreased, the Aggregate Balance increased, gradually easing Hong Kong dollar liquidity conditions.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍於3月兩度下調，以及反映年內隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息變動，基本利率由年初的2.73厘下降至年底收報0.50厘。在零售層面，儘管美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍調低，銀行仍維持最優惠貸款利率不變。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2019年的383億港元降至2020年的91億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the two downward adjustments of the US federal funds rate target range in March, and reflecting the changes in overnight and one-month Hong Kong interbank interest rates during the year, the Base Rate fell from 2.73% at the beginning of the year to 0.50% at the end of the year. At the retail level, despite the lowering of the US federal funds rate target range, banks kept their best lending rates unchanged. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount window lending decreased from HK$38.3 billion in 2019 to HK$9.1 billion in 2020.

src_raw: 過去30多年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，歷經考驗均能展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管2020年面對挑戰，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持正常運作，一再證明聯匯制度穩健有效。年內面對一些毫無根據的謠言，質疑聯匯制度以至香港的金融穩定，金管局迅速向公眾重申香港會繼續實施聯匯制度，同時資金自由流動及港幣自由兌換受到《基本法》第112條保障。金管局另又發表多篇文章，闡明逆境下香港金融體系繼續展現強大抵禦衝擊能力的事實。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。香港的金融市場有序運作，以及港元繼續如常作為支付及保值貨幣，反映上述措施有效維持公眾對聯匯制度的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在《2020年對外部門報告》重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: Over the past 30 years, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a vital pillar of Hong Kong’s financial system, demonstrating its strong ability to withstand shocks through various tests. Despite the challenges faced in 2020, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and monetary markets continued to operate normally, once again proving the robustness and effectiveness of the Linked Exchange Rate System. Amid unfounded rumours questioning the Linked Exchange Rate System and Hong Kong’s financial stability during the year, the HKMA swiftly reassured the public that Hong Kong would continue to implement the Linked Exchange Rate System, with the free flow of funds and the free convertibility of the Hong Kong dollar being guaranteed under Article 112 of the Basic Law. The HKMA also published several articles explaining how Hong Kong’s financial system continued to demonstrate its strong resilience in the face of adversity. The government also remained firmly committed to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. The orderly operation of Hong Kong’s financial markets and the continued normal use of the Hong Kong dollar as a medium of payment and a store of value reflected the effectiveness of these measures in maintaining public confidence in the Linked Exchange Rate System. In its 2020 External Sector Report, the International Monetary Fund reaffirmed that Hong Kong has transparent rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, robust financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework, ensuring the credibility of the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。儘管新冠病毒疫情構成負面影響，香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本水平以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。與此同時，金管局亦為銀行體系提供更多流動性，維持貨幣及金融穩定。除減發外匯基金票據以增加港元流動性外，金管局為銀行設立一系列流動資金安排。此外，金管局與銀行保持聯繫，確保它們在緊張情況時利用這些流動資金安排。因應新冠病毒疫情為環球金融市場帶來波動及不確定因素，金管局推出臨時性美元流動資金安排，為持牌銀行提供美元流動性支援，有助紓緩環球美元銀行拆借市場流動性緊絀的情況。
mt_raw: A robust banking system is crucial to the normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System. Despite the adverse impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong’s banking system continued to operate smoothly, with liquidity and capital levels remaining very strong by international standards. To ensure the banking system’s ability to withstand shocks, the HKMA closely monitored banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress test results, and maintained supervision over bank lending. At the same time, the HKMA provided more liquidity to the banking system to maintain monetary and financial stability. In addition to reducing the issuance of Exchange Fund Bills to increase Hong Kong dollar liquidity, the HKMA established a series of liquidity facilities for banks. Furthermore, the HKMA maintained communication with banks to ensure they utilised these liquidity facilities during times of stress. In response to the volatility and uncertainty in global financial markets caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, the HKMA introduced a temporary US dollar liquidity facility to provide US dollar liquidity support to licensed banks, helping to alleviate the tight liquidity conditions in the global US dollar interbank lending market.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2020年在109.8至112.1%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報109.9%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Currency Board’s accounts, since October 1998, a portion of the Exchange Fund’s assets has been designated to back the monetary base. The backing ratio (i.e. the ratio of backing assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.8% and 112.1% in 2020, without reaching the upper or lower limits. The ratio closed at 109.9% on 31 December (Chart 4). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as backing assets, all Exchange Fund assets can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Exchange Fund, combined with Hong Kong’s robust banking system, provide a strong safeguard for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2020年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括香港經濟的情景分析、香港物業市場的評估、了解跨境資金流的概念架構，以及了解香港銀行同業市場。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Committee, under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2020, the Currency Board Committee discussed topics including scenario analysis of Hong Kong’s economy, assessment of Hong Kong’s property market, understanding the conceptual framework of cross-border capital flows, and understanding Hong Kong’s interbank market. The meeting minutes of the Currency Board Committee and the reports on the operation of the Currency Board System submitted by the HKMA to the Committee are available on the HKMA’s website.

src_raw: 疫情持續下，香港貨幣及金融研究中心（研究中心）在2020年仍能維持一定數量的研究成果。在2020年，研究中心合共發表20篇研究論文，涵蓋貨幣政策、銀行體系穩定、市場微觀結構和金融科技發展等廣泛議題，部份論文已獲接納或正被評審在專業期刊中刊登。在疫情下由於要實施社交距離及旅遊限制，研究中心舉辦的研討會、講座及到訪研究計劃等主要活動需要押後，待日後公共衛生和旅遊條件回復正常後，研究中心將會復辦上述活動。
mt_raw: Despite the ongoing pandemic, the Hong Kong Monetary and Financial Research Institute (the Institute) maintained a certain level of research output in 2020. In 2020, the Institute published a total of 20 research papers covering a wide range of topics, including monetary policy, banking system stability, market microstructure, and financial technology development. Some of these papers have been accepted or are under review for publication in professional journals. Due to social distancing and travel restrictions imposed during the pandemic, major activities organised by the Institute, such as seminars, lectures, and visiting research programmes, had to be postponed. These activities will resume once public health and travel conditions return to normal.

src_raw: 截至2020年底，流通銀行紙幣（指發鈔銀行發行的紙幣）總值5,595億港元，較上年增加8.3%（圖5、6及7）。政府發行的流通紙幣及硬幣總值127億港元，較上年減少0.6%（圖8及9）。在政府發行的紙幣及硬幣中，10港元流通紙幣總值46億港元，其中塑質鈔票佔79%。
mt_raw: As of the end of 2020, the total value of banknotes in circulation issued by note-issuing banks was HK$5,595 billion, an increase of 8.3% compared to the previous year (Charts 5, 6 and 7). The total value of banknotes and coins in circulation issued by the government was HK$12.7 billion, a decrease of 0.6% compared to the previous year (Charts 8 and 9). Among the banknotes and coins issued by the government, the total value of HK$10 banknotes in circulation was HK$4.6 billion, of which polymer banknotes accounted for 79%.

src_raw: 硬幣收集計劃於2014年10月推出，年內繼續廣受大眾歡迎。這是全球首個有系統的流動硬幣收集計劃，設有兩部收銀車輪流停駐全港18區。每部收銀車均裝設兩部高速硬幣點算機，市民可選擇將硬幣轉換成鈔票或用作八達通卡或電子錢包等儲值支付工具增值，亦可將款項放入車內的公益金捐款箱。此外，金管局與香港社會服務聯會合作，在非政府組織賣旗日派出收銀車收集硬幣。收銀車亦到訪學校，增進學生對硬幣收集計劃的認識。過去多年硬幣收集計劃曾獲頒多個本港及國際獎項，對其創新及環保的處理方法予以肯定。
mt_raw: The Coin Collection Programme, launched in October 2014, continued to be popular with the public during the year. It is the world’s first systematic mobile coin collection programme, with two cash collection vehicles rotating across all 18 districts in Hong Kong. Each vehicle is equipped with two high-speed coin counters, allowing citizens to exchange coins for banknotes or use them to top up stored-value payment tools such as Octopus cards or e-wallets. They can also donate the funds to the Community Chest box inside the vehicle. In addition, the HKMA collaborated with the Hong Kong Council of Social Service to dispatch cash collection vehicles to collect coins during flag-selling days organised by non-governmental organisations. The vehicles also visited schools to enhance students’ understanding of the Coin Collection Programme. Over the years, the Coin Collection Programme has received multiple local and international awards in recognition of its innovative and environmentally friendly approach.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情爆發為經濟帶來重大挑戰，香港銀行體系於2020年維持穩健。年內金管局除密切留意疫情對銀行營運及監管活動的影響並靈活應變外，繼續將監管重點放在認可機構的信用及流動性風險管理上。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業使用金融科技的上升趨勢，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及運作穩健性的監管。金管局亦與銀行及國際組織緊密合作，促進業界過渡至備用參考利率。
mt_raw: Despite the significant challenges posed to the economy by the COVID-19 outbreak, Hong Kong’s banking system remained robust in 2020. Throughout the year, in addition to closely monitoring the impact of the pandemic on banking operations and regulatory activities and responding flexibly, the HKMA continued to focus its regulatory efforts on credit and liquidity risk management at authorised institutions. Given the increasing cyber threats and the growing adoption of financial technology in the banking sector, the HKMA strengthened its oversight of technology risk management and operational resilience at authorised institutions. The HKMA also worked closely with banks and international organisations to facilitate the industry’s transition to alternative reference rates.

src_raw: 在操守監管方面，金管局給予認可機構在遵守監管規定上彈性處理的空間以及提供指引，以便一方面協助銀行在疫情下的業務運作及繼續為客戶提供服務，另一方面則繼續確保投資者及消費者得到保障。金管局聯同有關當局制定「跨境理財通」業務試點的建議實施細則，並諮詢業界。金管局與證券及期貨事務監察委員會合作，就精簡有關家族辦公室及擁有高資產淨值並精於財務事宜的投資者的銷售程序提供指引。此外，金管局加強對數碼金融服務消費者的保障，並繼續推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct regulation, the HKMA provided authorised institutions with flexibility in complying with regulatory requirements and offered guidance to help banks maintain their operations and continue serving customers during the pandemic, while ensuring that investors and consumers remained protected. Together with relevant authorities, the HKMA formulated proposed implementation details for the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect pilot scheme and consulted the industry. The HKMA collaborated with the Securities and Futures Commission to provide guidance on streamlining sales procedures for family offices and high-net-worth, financially sophisticated investors. Additionally, the HKMA enhanced consumer protection in digital financial services and continued to promote a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 在打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面，金管局迅速採取行動，不但釐清風險為本方法及科技如何協助認可機構更有效應對與新冠病毒疫情相關的情況，並同時審慎應對持續升溫的地緣政治緊張局勢對銀行體系造成的影響。金管局繼續支持有關提升打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集工作的成效與效率的措施，包括增加參與公私營夥伴共享訊息的認可機構數目，以及支持銀行業採用合規科技。金管局又順應科技及數據運用的國際發展趨勢，展開進一步加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監察能力的計劃。
mt_raw: In the fight against money laundering and terrorist financing, the HKMA took swift action, clarifying how a risk-based approach and technology could help authorised institutions respond more effectively to situations related to the COVID-19 pandemic, while also prudently addressing the impact of escalating geopolitical tensions on the banking system. The HKMA continued to support measures aimed at enhancing the effectiveness and efficiency of anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing efforts. These included increasing the number of authorised institutions participating in public-private partnerships for information sharing and supporting the banking sector’s adoption of compliance technology. The HKMA also launched a programme to further strengthen its monitoring capabilities in anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing, in line with international developments in technology and data usage.

src_raw: 與此同時，金管局與銀行業緊密合作，優化監管政策與程序，以及推行提升人才專業能力的措施。香港在實施國際監管標準方面取得理想進展，包括資本充足標準和披露標準。在促進綠色及可持續銀行業的發展方面，金管局已進入三個階段中的第二階段，正制定相關監管規定。金管局亦繼續致力確保香港備有具公信力的認可機構處置機制，包括制定新處置標準及實施吸收虧損能力規定的規則，以提升認可機構的處置可行性。
mt_raw: Meanwhile, the HKMA worked closely with the banking sector to optimise regulatory policies and procedures and implement measures to enhance talent professionalism. Hong Kong made good progress in implementing international regulatory standards, including capital adequacy and disclosure standards. In promoting the development of green and sustainable banking, the HKMA has entered the second of three phases and is formulating relevant regulatory requirements. The HKMA also continued to ensure that Hong Kong has a credible resolution regime for authorised institutions, including by developing new resolution standards and implementing rules on loss-absorbing capacity to enhance the resolvability of authorised institutions.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、應對危機及自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system due to their mode of operation, or even, in extreme cases, due to disorderly failure. As a regulator, the Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority plays a crucial role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring that banks are able to withstand shocks, manage crises and recover from crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks and the authorisation of licensed banks, restricted licence banks and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong (collectively referred to as "authorised institutions"). The Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority is also responsible for the designation and supervision of certain financial market infrastructures.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，必須制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority cannot guarantee that the financial system is risk-free, and Hong Kong’s prudential regulatory regime is not designed to ensure "zero risk". As one of the resolution authorities, the Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority strives to ensure that, should an authorised institution become unsustainable, its failure can be handled in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution regime, under which the Chief Executive of the Financial Management Authority is the resolution authority for authorised institutions (and other types of institutions). To implement Hong Kong’s resolution regime, it is necessary to develop resolution rules and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to remove obstacles to the resolvability of authorised institutions, and build the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve authorised institutions that are on the verge of failure. To effectively carry out the above work, the HKMA adopts an internationally consistent and coordinated approach.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估屬較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行610次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查及評估的主要重點之一。另一個重點是在新冠病毒疫情下的業務操作風險及科技風險管理。此外，金管局又增加針對流動性及市場風險管理的現場審查及專題評估次數。同時，專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查及專題評估。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site inspections, the HKMA conducted regular on-site inspections and thematic assessments to review areas deemed to be of higher risk. During the year, the HKMA conducted 610 on-site inspections and thematic assessments, continuing to focus primarily on credit risk management. Another focus was operational risk and technology risk management in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site inspections and thematic assessments on liquidity and market risk management. Meanwhile, the Special Inspection Team conducted on-site inspections and thematic assessments of authorised institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF)-related businesses.

The special stress test analysis conducted by the HKMA showed that banks were capable of withstanding the economic pressure brought by the COVID-19 pandemic.

src_raw: 因應新冠病毒疫情爆發，金管局於2019年10月成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制（協調機制）推出多輪協助企業及個人客戶的紓緩措施，鼓勵銀行在審慎風險管理原則容許下繼續支持借款人的融資需要。其中最主要的是協調機制於5月推出的「預先批核還息不還本」計劃。計劃下合資格的企業客戶的所有貸款本金還款可延期6個月。該計劃在11月延長6個月後，在2021年3月再度延長6個月至10月底。該計劃約有100間銀行參與，覆蓋12萬合資格企業客戶。截至12月底，銀行共批出58,000多宗企業客戶貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉及金額超過7,400億港元。個人客戶方面，銀行亦推出住宅按揭「還息不還本」計劃，「居者有其屋計劃」下資助房屋的相關按揭亦涵蓋在內。此外，銀行亦提供應急貸款予從事受疫情嚴重打擊行業的客戶、延長個人貸款期限，以及下調各種個人信貸的收費。截至12月底，銀行共批出28,000多宗住宅按揭「還息不還本」及其他個人應急貸款的個案，涉及金額超過440億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the COVID-19 outbreak, the Banking Sector SME Lending Coordination Mechanism (Coordination Mechanism) established by the HKMA in October 2019 launched multiple rounds of relief measures to assist corporate and individual customers, encouraging banks to continue supporting borrowers’ financing needs under prudent risk management principles. The most significant of these was the “pre-approved principal payment holiday” scheme launched by the Coordination Mechanism in May. Under the scheme, all principal repayments of eligible corporate customers’ loans could be deferred for six months. After being extended for six months in November, the scheme was further extended for another six months to end-October 2021 in March 2021. Around 100 banks participated in the scheme, covering 120,000 eligible corporate customers. As at end-December, banks had approved over 58,000 cases of loan extensions and other support measures for corporate customers, involving an amount of over HK$740 billion. For individual customers, banks also launched a residential mortgage “principal payment holiday” scheme, which also covered mortgages for subsidised housing under the Home Ownership Scheme. In addition, banks provided emergency loans to customers in industries severely affected by the pandemic, extended personal loan tenors, and reduced fees for various personal credit products. As at end-December, banks had approved over 28,000 cases of residential mortgage “principal payment holiday” and other personal emergency loans, involving an amount of over HK$44 billion.

src_raw: 金管局自2009年起先後推出多輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已經加強銀行的風險管理及香港銀行體系應對本港樓市一旦突然逆轉的抵禦能力。新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數於2020年12月為57%，而有關按揭成數於2009年9月推出首輪逆周期措施前為64%。2020年新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數有所上升，主要由於當中涉及按揭保險的貸款的佔比有所增加，而這類貸款的按揭成數一般較高。新批出按揭的平均供款與入息比率亦維持在低水平，於12月為37%，而在2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時為41%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Since 2009, the HKMA has introduced a series of countercyclical macroprudential regulatory measures to strengthen banks’ risk management and the resilience of the Hong Kong banking system to a sudden downturn in the local property market. The average loan-to-value ratio of newly approved residential mortgage loans was 57% in December 2020, compared with 64% before the introduction of the first round of countercyclical measures in September 2009. The average loan-to-value ratio of newly approved residential mortgage loans increased in 2020, mainly due to the higher proportion of loans involving mortgage insurance, which generally have a higher loan-to-value ratio. The average debt-to-income ratio of newly approved mortgages also remained at a low level, at 37% in December, compared with 41% when the cap on the ratio was first introduced in August 2010 (Chart 1).

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector'}
src_raw: 因應2020年初爆發新冠病毒疫情，金管局採取連串措施減低疫情對銀行業務運作的影響。有關措施包括要求認可機構檢討其持續業務運作計劃，並採取適當的預防措施，以保障員工與客戶的健康，以及維持重要銀行服務。此外，金管局提醒認可機構加強與員工及客戶的溝通，就其處所可能出現確診個案的情況作好準備，以及制定應對較為嚴峻但可能發生的風險情境的持續業務運作計劃。金管局與業界保持緊密聯繫，又要求認可機構保持警覺，並因應疫情的最新發展及政府的社交距離措施，不時審視其持續業務運作計劃。
mt_raw: In response to the COVID-19 outbreak in early 2020, the HKMA took a series of measures to mitigate the impact of the pandemic on banking operations. These measures included requiring authorised institutions to review their business continuity plans and take appropriate preventive measures to protect the health of employees and customers and maintain critical banking services. The HKMA also reminded authorised institutions to strengthen communication with employees and customers, prepare for possible confirmed cases in their premises, and formulate business continuity plans to cope with more severe but possible risk scenarios. The HKMA maintained close contact with the industry and required authorised institutions to remain vigilant and review their business continuity plans from time to time in light of the latest developments of the pandemic and the government’s social distancing measures.

src_raw: 金管局完成對「網絡防衛計劃」的全面檢討及廣泛的業界諮詢後，於11月推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，因應海外網絡風險管理的最新做法，進一步提升「網絡防衛計劃」。當中「網絡防衛評估框架」加入了有關網絡事故應對及恢復的最新國際穩健做法。「網絡防衛計劃」下的「專業培訓計劃」方面，資歷認證清單的範圍有所擴大，納入主要海外地區的同等資歷。金管局又向香港銀行公會（銀行公會）提出多項建議，令「網絡風險資訊共享平台」更易於使用。「網絡防衛計劃2.0」於2021年1月1日生效。
mt_raw: After completing a comprehensive review of the “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework” and extensive industry consultation, the HKMA launched the “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework 2.0” in November to further enhance the framework in line with the latest overseas practices in cyber risk management. The updated framework incorporated the latest international sound practices on cyber incident response and recovery. Under the “Professional Training Programme” of the framework, the scope of the qualifications recognition list was expanded to include equivalent qualifications from major overseas regions. The HKMA also made several suggestions to the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) to make the “Cyber Risk Information Sharing Platform” more user-friendly. The “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework 2.0” came into effect on 1 January 2021.

src_raw: 經過在「金融科技監管沙盒」進行嚴謹的測試與試行後，所有在2019年獲發銀行牌照的8間虛擬銀行都已經於年內開業。虛擬銀行運用創新科技，提供全新的客戶體驗，例如利用大數據分析進行中小企貸款的信貸評估，以加快貸款批核程序。為加強客戶參與及建立客戶對品牌的忠誠，部分虛擬銀行更在其定期存款及獎賞計劃等服務中加入遊戲元素。
mt_raw: After rigorous testing and trial in the “Fintech Regulatory Sandbox”, all eight virtual banks that were granted banking licences in 2019 commenced operations during the year. Virtual banks leverage innovative technologies to provide a new customer experience, such as using big data analytics for credit assessment of SME loans to speed up the loan approval process. To enhance customer engagement and build brand loyalty, some virtual banks have also incorporated gaming elements into their services, such as time deposits and reward programmes.

src_raw: 香港位處內地金融市場對外開放的要衝，能充分把握開放過程中的契機。憑藉世界級的市場基建以及「滬港通」、「深港通」與「債券通」，香港既是深受內地企業垂青的集資平台，亦是國際投資者進入增長迅速的內地市場的窗口。年內在促進粵港澳大灣區金融合作，尤其便利香港居民在大灣區內使用金融及銀行服務方面取得良好進展。
mt_raw: Hong Kong is strategically located at the forefront of the opening up of mainland China’s financial market, and is able to fully capitalise on the opportunities arising from the process. Leveraging its world-class market infrastructure and the Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect, Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect and Bond Connect programmes, Hong Kong is both a fundraising platform favoured by mainland enterprises and a gateway for international investors to access the rapidly growing mainland market. Good progress was made during the year in promoting financial cooperation in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA), particularly in facilitating Hong Kong residents’ use of financial and banking services within the GBA.

src_raw:
為鞏固香港的亞洲金融科技樞紐地位，金管局繼續致力實施各項措施，促進銀行及支付行業開發與應用科技。年內的主要進展包括：
- 推動更廣泛使用快速支付系統「轉數快」；
- 促進銀行業實施開放應用程式介面（開放API）；
- 連接貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）轄下的貿易金融區塊鏈平台，促進貿易融資數碼化；
- 研究央行數碼貨幣於跨境支付的應用；
- 探討「商業數據通」的技術可行性及研究新類型信貸評分模型，以助中小型企業（中小企）獲取融資；
- 公布旨在發展更具規模及更多元的合規科技生態圈的兩年計劃，進一步推動合規科技的應用；
- 加強培育人才；及
- 推進跨境金融科技合作。
mt_raw:
To consolidate Hong Kong’s position as a fintech hub in Asia, the HKMA continued to implement various measures to promote the development and application of technology by the banking and payment industries. Key developments during the year included:
- Promoting wider use of the Faster Payment System (FPS).
- Encouraging the banking sector to implement open application programming interfaces (open APIs).
- Connecting the trade finance platform eTradeConnect with the trade finance blockchain platform under the People’s Bank of China (PBoC) to promote the digitalisation of trade finance.
- Studying the application of central bank digital currency in cross-border payments.
- Exploring the technical feasibility of Commercial Data Interchange and studying new types of credit scoring models to help small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) obtain financing.
- Announcing a two-year plan aimed at developing a more extensive and diversified Regtech ecosystem to further promote the application of Regtech.
- Strengthening talent development.
- Advancing cross-border fintech cooperation.

src_raw: 隨着主要金融市場指數開始加入內地在岸證券或增加其權重，流入人民幣資產的資金繼續加快步伐。香港得天獨厚，憑藉連繫內地資本市場的「滬港通」、「深港通」及「債券通」，在促進國際投資者增加人民幣資產配置方面發揮關鍵的作用。在2020年，「債券通」平均每日交易額增加82%，至約193億元人民幣。為完善「債券通」運作，金管局推出新措施，包括新設特別結算周期服務、延長交易時間及引入新安排，讓投資者在選擇銀行進行貨幣兌換與外幣對沖方面有較多彈性。繼「債券通」北向通取得成功，金管局又與人民銀行組成工作小組研究南向通的框架。
mt_raw: As major financial market indices began to include mainland China’s onshore securities or increase their weightings, the inflow of funds into renminbi assets continued to accelerate. Hong Kong is uniquely positioned to play a key role in encouraging international investors to increase their allocation of renminbi assets, leveraging the Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect, Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect and Bond Connect programmes that link it to mainland China’s capital market. In 2020, the average daily trading volume of Bond Connect increased by 82% to about RMB19.3 billion. To improve the operation of Bond Connect, the HKMA introduced new measures, including a new special settlement cycle service, extended trading hours and new arrangements to give investors more flexibility in choosing banks for currency exchange and foreign currency hedging. Following the success of the northbound trading of Bond Connect, the HKMA and the PBoC formed a working group to study the framework for southbound trading.

src_raw: 金管局亦繼續致力加強香港與粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）內地城市之間的金融配套措施。內地當局公布一系列政策措施，支持區內金融發展。於6月，人民銀行、金管局與澳門金融管理局（澳門金管局）聯合宣布決定實施跨境「理財通」。金管局一直與內地和本地當局以及業界緊密合作，制定有關實施細則。金管局亦就其他措施與內地當局保持聯繫，尋求為香港銀行擴大政策空間拓展更廣闊的跨境業務範疇。年內，香港繼續保持作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。香港的人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額創出1.2萬億元人民幣的新高。
mt_raw: The HKMA also continued to work to strengthen financial infrastructure between Hong Kong and the mainland cities in the GBA. The mainland authorities announced a series of policy measures to support financial development in the region. In June, the PBoC, the HKMA and the Monetary Authority of Macao (AMCM) jointly announced the decision to implement the cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect. The HKMA has been working closely with the mainland and local authorities and the industry to formulate the implementation details. The HKMA also maintained contact with the mainland authorities on other measures to seek to expand the policy space for Hong Kong banks to expand their cross-border business scope more broadly. During the year, Hong Kong maintained its position as a global offshore renminbi business hub. The average daily transaction volume of Hong Kong’s Renminbi Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a new high of RMB1.2 trillion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓新機遇，提升香港金融平台競爭力。為促進香港基金業務的發展，金管局與政府及業界緊密合作，為基金在本地落戶締造更有利的稅務及監管環境。金管局亦投入大量工作，繼續提升香港作為區內綠色及可持續金融樞紐的地位。與此同時，金管局加強市場推廣，向海外及內地持份者推廣香港的金融服務。
mt_raw: The HKMA actively explored new opportunities to enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To promote the development of Hong Kong’s fund industry, the HKMA worked closely with the government and the industry to create a more favourable tax and regulatory environment for funds to establish a presence locally. The HKMA also devoted a lot of effort to continue to enhance Hong Kong’s position as a regional green and sustainable finance hub. At the same time, the HKMA stepped up market promotion to promote Hong Kong’s financial services to overseas and mainland stakeholders.

mt_raw: In the area of central banking, the HKMA played a leading role in a number of regional and international committees. For example, the HKMA chaired the Policy and Standards Sub-group under the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (Basel Committee) and the Financial Markets Working Group under the Executives’ Meeting of East Asia and Pacific Central Banks (EMEAP). The HKMA also co-chaired the Non-Bank Supervision Expert Group and the Financial Innovation Network under the Financial Stability Board, and led a group to discuss regulatory issues related to benchmark transition.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港的國際金融中心地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2020年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. The four RTGS systems for processing interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) system for debt instruments and the Hong Kong Trade Repository achieved a system availability rate of 100% in 2020, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Through accounts with two central securities depositories in mainland China, the CMU system continued to assist in the settlement of northbound Bond Connect transactions and to hold mainland debt securities for relevant CMU system members.

terms: {'香港身份證號碼': 'Hong Kong Identity Card number'}
src_raw: 自2018年9月轉數快推出以來，已有35間銀行及12間儲值支付工具營運商加入，其中在2020年增加了5間銀行及1間儲值支付工具營運商。轉數快使用量亦穩步增長。截至12月31日，轉數快共錄得690萬個登記（圖1）。為方便市民收取由機構發出的款項，轉數快於12月6日起新增以香港身份證號碼作帳戶識別代號。引入這項功能後不足1個月已錄得超過110,000個登記。這項新功能並非用於個人對個人轉帳，只供已有收款人身份證號碼的機構發放款項（例如發放薪酬）之用。由於每名市民的身份證號碼都是獨一無二，市民利用香港身份證號碼作為帳戶識別代號，即使不提供銀行帳戶號碼都能夠確保準確收取款項。
mt_raw: Since the launch of FPS in September 2018, 35 banks and 12 stored value payment instrument operators have joined, with five banks and one stored value payment instrument operator added in 2020. The usage of FPS also grew steadily. As at 31 December, FPS recorded a total of 6.9 million registrations (Chart 1). To facilitate citizens in receiving payments issued by organisations, FPS added the use of Hong Kong identity card numbers as account proxies on 6 December. Within less than one month after the introduction of this function, over 110,000 registrations were recorded. This new function is not for person-to-person transfers, but only for organisations that already have the payee’s identity card number to issue payments (e.g. salary payments). As each citizen’s identity card number is unique, citizens can use their Hong Kong identity card number as an account proxy to ensure accurate receipt of payments even without providing a bank account number.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction volume', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫情及保持社交距離措施為使用電子支付服務帶來新動力。年內轉數快交易量增長尤其迅速（圖2），於2020年12月的平均每日交易量達505,000宗即時交易（涉及52億港元及9,500萬元人民幣），相當於2019年12月168,000宗的3倍，更是2018年10月轉數快推出首月的10倍。轉數快使用量增加，亦受惠於應用範圍逐步擴大，由最初主要用作個人對個人支付，逐步擴展至繳付帳單（包括政府帳單）、零售及商業支付。
mt_raw: The COVID-19 pandemic and social distancing measures provided new impetus for the use of electronic payment services. FPS transaction volumes grew particularly rapidly during the year (Chart 2), with an average daily transaction volume of 505,000 immediate transactions in December 2020 (involving HK$5.2 billion and RMB95 million), equivalent to three times the 168,000 transactions in December 2019, and 10 times the first month after the launch of FPS in October 2018. The increase in FPS usage also benefited from the gradual expansion of its application scope, from initially being used mainly for person-to-person payments to bill payments (including government bills), retail and commercial payments.

terms: {'金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '電子錢包': 'e-wallets'}
src_raw: 金管局與多個政府部門及銀行業一直合作，將轉數快的應用範圍由個人對個人支付，擴展至繳付帳單及其他商戶支付。政府於2019年11月起接受以轉數快繳付帳單，以推廣使用轉數快及便利市民。市民以支援轉數快的手機銀行或電子錢包掃描印於帳單上的二維碼，即可輕鬆繳付稅款、差餉及地租、水費及政府發出的一般繳費單。截至2020年12月經轉數快繳付政府帳單的交易達180萬宗，涉及22億港元。繼繳付政府帳單服務成功推出後，再有4個政府部門由2020年12月21日起接受在指定繳費櫃枱及自助服務機以轉數快二維碼繳費。政府亦正在探討於網上採用轉數快付款的安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA has been working with various government departments and the banking sector to expand the application scope of FPS from person-to-person payments to bill payments and other merchant payments. Since November 2019, the government has accepted FPS for bill payments to promote the use of FPS and facilitate citizens. Citizens can use their FPS-supported mobile banking or e-wallets to scan the QR code printed on the bill to easily pay taxes, rates and rent, water charges and general payment orders issued by the government. As at December 2020, 1.8 million government bill payments had been made through FPS, involving HK$2.2 billion. Following the successful launch of the government bill payment service, four more government departments began accepting FPS QR code payments at designated payment counters and self-service machines from 21 December 2020. The government is also exploring arrangements for online FPS payments.

src_raw: 另一正面的發展是越來越多大小商戶採用轉數快以加強業務營運。支付商戶的交易在2020年12月急增至平均每日100,000宗，較2019年12月增加38倍轉數快普遍用作繳付帳單、應用程式內直接扣帳，以及進行其他網上購物。電子錢包日益普及，亦帶動了以轉數快為帳戶增值的交易量顯著增長。2020年12月平均每日增值的交易量，是2019年12月的7倍。
mt_raw: Another positive development is that more and more merchants, large and small, are adopting FPS to enhance their business operations. Merchant payment transactions surged to an average of 100,000 per day in December 2020, a 38-fold increase compared with December 2019. FPS is commonly used for bill payments, in-app direct debits, and other online shopping. The growing popularity of e-wallets has also driven a significant increase in the volume of transactions using FPS for account top-ups. The average daily top-up transaction volume in December 2020 was seven times that of December 2019.

mt_raw: To enhance public awareness of FPS, the HKMA produced various educational and promotional materials, including TV advertisements and a series of smart usage tips on social media platforms. The HKMA also organised a WhatsApp Stickers design competition for secondary school students to increase their knowledge of electronic payments. In addition, the HKMA promoted the use of FPS for receiving and making payments to a number of charitable organisations and market operators. A number of banks and stored value payment instrument operators participating in FPS also launched promotional activities, including offering incentives to encourage customers to register and use FPS for transfers and bill payments. Building on the achievements of 2020, the HKMA worked with banks and stored value payment instrument operators in early 2021 to promote the use of FPS for electronic red packet distribution. While the HKMA launched a promotional campaign, banks and stored value payment instrument operators offered incentives to encourage customers to distribute red packets electronically, which is both environmentally friendly and helpful in fighting the pandemic.

mt_raw: In terms of central bank digital currency, the HKMA and the Bank of Thailand continued their joint research on the application of central bank digital currency in cross-border payments to promote synchronous foreign exchange settlement of HK dollars and Thai baht between banks in Hong Kong and Thailand. src_raw: 2020年是峰迴路轉的一年，新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來前所未有的挑戰。資產市場於第1 季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後，在主要央行推出超寬鬆的貨幣政策及各地政府實施大規模的財政紓困措施帶動下，得以迅速反彈。由於主要央行大幅下調基準利率並重啟量化寬鬆措施，令國債收益率顯著下跌、債券價格上升。在此投資環境下，外匯基金在2020 年錄得2,358 億港元的投資收入，回報率為5.3%。
mt_raw: The year 2020 was one of significant upheaval, with the COVID-19 pandemic presenting unprecedented challenges to the global economy. After substantial adjustments and volatility in asset markets during the first quarter, a rapid recovery ensued, driven by the introduction of highly accommodative monetary policies by major central banks and large-scale fiscal relief measures implemented by governments worldwide. As major central banks significantly lowered benchmark interest rates and resumed quantitative easing, government bond yields fell sharply and bond prices rose. In this investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$235.8 billion in 2020, with a return of 5.3%.

src_raw:
外匯基金諮詢委員會為外匯基金制定下列投資目標：
(a) 保障資本；
(b) 確保整體貨幣基礎在任何時候都由流通性極高的美元資產提供十足支持；

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一，以及未來基金存款與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has prudently and progressively allocated some of the Exchange Fund’s assets to more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure) and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held by the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held by the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The market value ceiling of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio is one-third of the Exchange Fund’s accumulated surplus, plus the sum of future fund deposits and deposits from Exchange Fund subsidiaries linked to the Long-Term Growth Portfolio.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，會以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund’s investment process is based on both strategic and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation is reflected in investment benchmarks, which represent the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can make to achieve its investment objectives. The Exchange Fund uses strategic allocation as a guide and employs tactical asset allocation to achieve returns above the benchmark. As a result, actual allocations often deviate from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is called a “tactical deviation”. The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmarks and tracking error limits, and the HKMA is authorised to determine the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range for tactical deviations. Portfolio managers can manage positions within the permissible range of tactical deviations to profit from short-term market changes.

src_raw: 金管局的外匯基金投資辦公室專責投資及相關風險管理職能。該辦公室職員負責直接管理外匯基金約72%的投資，包括整個支持組合及部分投資組合。該部分投資組合包括不同的環球定息市場投資，並透過衍生工具執行外匯基金的宏觀風險管理策略。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s Exchange Fund Investment Office is responsible for investment and related risk management functions. The office’s staff directly manage about 72% of the Exchange Fund’s investments, including the entire Backing Portfolio and part of the Investment Portfolio. This part of the Investment Portfolio includes various global fixed-income market investments and uses derivatives to implement the Exchange Fund’s macro risk management strategy.

src_raw: 除透過內部職員管理資產外，金管局亦僱用外聘投資經理負責管理外匯基金約28%的資產，包括所有上市股票組合及其他特別資產。僱用外聘投資經理的目的是要運用市場上最佳的專業投資專才為外匯基金投資，獲取可持續回報，並讓外匯基金受惠於多元化及互補的投資方式，以及汲取市場心得與專門的投資知識。
mt_raw: In addition to managing assets through internal staff, the HKMA also employs external investment managers to manage about 28% of the Exchange Fund’s assets, including all listed equity portfolios and other special assets. The purpose of employing external investment managers is to leverage the best professional investment talent in the market to invest the Exchange Fund’s assets, achieve sustainable returns, and enable the Exchange Fund to benefit from diversified and complementary investment approaches, as well as to gain market insights and specialised investment knowledge.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，風險管理的重要性不言而喻。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂下嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並設立嚴謹的風險監察及合規制度。金管局為投資相關活動設有三重防線以確保有效的風險管理及監察。金管局亦定期監察主要投資風險類別（包括信用、市場、流動性及業務操作風險），並已加強風險管理程序以配合外匯基金的多元化投資。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, effective risk management is essential. The HKMA has established strict control measures and investment guidelines for portfolios managed by both internal and external investment managers, and has implemented a robust risk monitoring and compliance system. The HKMA has established a three-line defence for investment-related activities to ensure effective risk management and monitoring. The HKMA also regularly monitors major investment risk categories (including credit, market, liquidity and operational risks) and has strengthened risk management processes to accommodate the Exchange Fund’s diversified investments.

src_raw: 金管局訂有一套原則，以評估外匯基金投資項目的ESG風險與機會。就外聘投資經理所管理的資產組合而言，金管局透過獲委任的投資經理執行負責任投資。在甄選、委任及監察外聘投資經理的過程中，金管局會評估其落實ESG的不同範疇，包括ESG管治方面的組織架構、ESG標準及政策、將ESG因素併入投資程序中的情況，以及管理督導的業務活動，即代理投票和與投資組合公司的溝通（例如與投資組合公司管理層商討ESG的事宜）。為彰顯對負責任投資的重視，金管局透過外聘投資經理在管理督導方面扮演的角色，推動更完善的ESG做法。負責管理金管局的香港股票組合及中國內地股票主動投資管理組合的外聘投資經理，須承諾遵守證券及期貨事務監察委員會頒布的《負責任的擁有權原則》，若未能遵守則須作出解釋。至於負責管理已發展市場股票組合的外聘投資經理則需恪守國際公認的ESG標準。此外，金管局又展開聘任後監察計劃，以審視外聘投資經理的代理投票及與投資組合公司溝通的落實概況。
mt_raw: The HKMA has established a set of principles to assess the ESG risks and opportunities of the Exchange Fund’s investment projects. For portfolios managed by external investment managers, the HKMA implements responsible investment through appointed investment managers. When selecting, appointing and monitoring external investment managers, the HKMA assesses their implementation of various ESG aspects, including ESG governance structure, ESG standards and policies, integration of ESG factors into investment processes, and oversight of business activities such as proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies (e.g., discussing ESG issues with portfolio company management). To demonstrate its commitment to responsible investment, the HKMA promotes better ESG practices through the role played by external investment managers in oversight. External investment managers responsible for managing the HKMA’s Hong Kong equity portfolio and Mainland China active equity portfolio are required to commit to complying with the Principles of Responsible Ownership issued by the Securities and Futures Commission, and must provide explanations if they fail to comply. External investment managers responsible for managing developed market equity portfolios are required to adhere to internationally recognised ESG standards. Additionally, the HKMA has launched a post-appointment monitoring programme to review external investment managers’ proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies.

src_raw: 由金管局內部人員負責管理的定息投資組合，亦將ESG因素融入債券投資的信用風險分析中。藉著擴大ESG數據來源以及在量化評估中提高ESG因素的權重，加強相關的分析。
mt_raw: For fixed-income portfolios managed by HKMA internal staff, ESG factors are integrated into credit risk analysis for bond investments. This analysis is strengthened by expanding ESG data sources and increasing the weight of ESG factors in quantitative assessments.

src_raw: 至於在公開市場的ESG投資，金管局自2015年起投資於綠色、社會責任及可持續債券（ESG債券），是這個市場的早期投資者之一。此外，金管局亦參與國際金融公司的「聯合貸款組合管理計劃」，而其投資對象聚焦於新興市場的可持續發展項目。在2020年，適逢市場供應增加，金管局增加ESG債券的投資。展望未來，金管局將繼續透過直接投資或持有ESG債券基金等方式，壯大其ESG債券組合。此外，金管局將透過採納ESG股票指數作為被動投資組合的投資基準，推動外聘投資經理建立以ESG為主題的股票投資方針。金管局在未來幾年將會繼續留意以ESG為主題的投資機會，例如主動式的ESG投資組合及低碳為題的投資工具。
mt_raw: As for ESG investment in public markets, the HKMA has been investing in green, social and sustainability bonds (ESG bonds) since 2015, making it one of the early investors in this market. The HKMA also participates in the International Finance Corporation’s “Syndicated Loan Portfolio Management Programme”, which focuses on sustainable development projects in emerging markets. In 2020, as market supply increased, the HKMA increased its investment in ESG bonds. Looking ahead, the HKMA will continue to grow its ESG bond portfolio through direct investment or by holding ESG bond funds. Furthermore, the HKMA will promote the establishment of ESG-themed equity investment strategies by external investment managers by adopting ESG equity indices as investment benchmarks for passive portfolios. Over the next few years, the HKMA will continue to explore ESG-themed investment opportunities, such as active ESG portfolios and low-carbon investment instruments.

src_raw: 私募市場投資方面，金管局在盡職審查過程中檢視專責合夥人的ESG政策及具體措施。金管局的長期增長組合積極投資於具備可持續特點的項目，包括可再生能源基建，而在房地產投資組合亦有吸納具有綠色及可持續特點的倉庫及其他建築物。金管局將在未來繼續物色具備可持續特點的項目，並在房地產投資方面將綠色認證列入為重要考慮因素。金管局與專責合夥人舉行年度ESG工作坊，就良好的ESG作業手法交流意見及經驗。在11月舉行的ESG工作坊上，一眾專責合夥人就新冠病毒疫情對其投資組合公司及ESG投資發展所造成的影響交換意見。為提高私募市場投資的ESG透明度，金管局已要求專責合夥人提供有關其投資項目的ESG資訊，例如氣候變化風險等，以便監察。
mt_raw: In private market investments, the HKMA reviews general partners’ ESG policies and specific measures during the due diligence process. The HKMA’s Long-Term Growth Portfolio actively invests in projects with sustainable characteristics, including renewable energy infrastructure, and its real estate portfolio includes warehouses and other buildings with green and sustainable features. Going forward, the HKMA will continue to identify projects with sustainable characteristics and will consider green certification as an important factor in real estate investment. The HKMA holds annual ESG workshops with general partners to exchange views and experiences on good ESG practices. At the ESG workshop held in November, general partners discussed the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on their portfolio companies and ESG investment developments. To enhance ESG transparency in private market investments, the HKMA has required general partners to provide ESG information about their investment projects, such as climate change risks, for monitoring purposes.

src_raw: 金管局往後仍會密切觀察ESG標準的發展，評估如何將有關標準進一步融入投資程序，當中包括與理念相近的投資者及國際組織互動合作。金管局作為聯合國支持的《負責任投資原則》的簽署人之一，肩負作為全球倡導者的責任，日後將會參與制定ESG最佳作業手法，並推動其他投資者採納負責任的投資方法。金管局亦是非牟利機構 FCLTGlobal 的成員，該機構旨在透過舉辦工作坊及研究，鼓勵以長遠目標為本的業務及投資決策。金管局亦有參與「氣候相關財務資訊披露工作小組」，並為「央行與監管機構綠色金融網絡」的成員。此外，金管局籌辦講座及積極參與投資業界舉辦的活動，分享及推廣有關ESG投資的理念。
mt_raw: The HKMA will continue to closely monitor developments in ESG standards and assess how to further integrate these standards into investment processes, including collaborating with like-minded investors and international organisations. As a signatory to the UN-supported Principles for Responsible Investment, the HKMA has a responsibility as a global advocate and will participate in developing ESG best practices and encouraging other investors to adopt responsible investment methods. The HKMA is also a member of FCLTGlobal, a non-profit organisation that promotes long-term business and investment decision-making through workshops and research. Additionally, the HKMA participates in the Climate-related Financial Information Disclosure Task Force and is a member of the Central Banks and Supervisors Network for Greening the Financial System. The HKMA also organises seminars and actively participates in investment industry events to share and promote ESG investment concepts.

src_raw: 因應受新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來的重大挑戰而推出的寬鬆貨幣及財政政策支持下，環球金融市場在年底時升至高位。環球股票市場於第1季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後迅速反彈，主要市場更錄得雙位數字的增長。美國標準普爾500指數上升16%，是2020年表現最佳的七大工業國股票指數。
mt_raw: Supported by accommodative monetary and fiscal policies introduced in response to the significant challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic to the global economy, global financial markets reached highs by the end of the year. Global equity markets rebounded strongly after experiencing substantial adjustments and volatility in the first quarter, with major markets recording double-digit growth. The US S&P 500 index rose by 16%, making it the best-performing equity index among the Group of Seven countries in 2020.
